89.reason: [If no token matches, it returns null, but the caller in TokenLize does not check for null before accessing token.getType(), which will cause a NullPointerException when encountering an unrecognized lexical unit (e.g., single '&' or '|').]

96.reason: [When nextToken() returns null (e.g., due to unrecognized lexeme like single '&' or '|'), token is null]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.25 , reason:  [When nextToken() returns null (e.g., due to unrecognized lexeme like single '&' or '|'), token is null]

98.reason: [This line will throw a NullPointerException if nextToken() returns null, which happens when an invalid character (like standalone '&') is encountered but not matched by any TokenType pattern because ERROR_AND and ERROR_OR are defined but may not be matched due to readCurrentWord() consuming more than one character or incorrect matching order. Additionally, even if ERROR_* types exist, they might not be reached due to how currentWord is extracted.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.25 , reason:  [Calling getType() on null token causes NullPointerException, so lexical errors like single '&' are not handled properly and crash the program instead of reporting error 'a']
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This line will throw a NullPointerException if nextToken() returns null, which happens when an invalid character (like standalone '&') is encountered but not matched by any TokenType pattern because ERROR_AND and ERROR_OR are defined but may not be matched due to readCurrentWord() consuming more than one character or incorrect matching order. Additionally, even if ERROR_* types exist, they might not be reached due to how currentWord is extracted.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This line will throw a NullPointerException if nextToken() returns null, which happens when an invalid character sequence (e.g., standalone '&') is not matched by any TokenType pattern due to incorrect ordering or missing fallback error handling.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [This line will throw a NullPointerException if nextToken() returns null, which happens when an invalid character (not matching any token pattern) is encountered. The code does not handle the case where token is null.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [If nextToken() returns null (e.g., due to unrecognized lexeme), calling token.getType() causes a NullPointerException]
